name: Neck CT with Contrast
description: CT of the neck with contrast for soft tissue and lymph node evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the neck with intravenous contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Pharynx and Larynx
sections.content: Pharynx and larynx [are unremarkable / no mass / no obstruction]. No vocal cord paralysis.

sections.name: Thyroid
sections.content: Thyroid [is homogeneous / no focal lesions / no masses].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Cervical lymph nodes [are not enlarged / no pathologic adenopathy]. No clusters of abnormal nodes.

sections.name: Salivary Glands
sections.content: Parotid and submandibular glands [are unremarkable / no mass / no stones].

impression:
1. No mass or lymphadenopathy.
2. Normal neck CT.
